title: Inventory Audio Modules
summary: Current-state inventory of source-only metadata for the twelve committed src/audio/ TypeScript modules that model the vanilla DOOM 1.9 audio surface: DMX digital sound lump parser, eight-slot SFX channel allocator, S_AdjustSoundParams distance/pan computation, S_UpdateSounds per-tic origin update, S_StartSound entry point, i_sdlsound.c DMX-to-int16 PCM resampler/mixer, MUS score-event parser, MUS quicktick scheduler, S_StartMusic/S_ChangeMusic/S_StopMusic/S_PauseSound/S_ResumeSound/S_SetMusicVolume music lifecycle, OPL2 (YM3812) register file model, OPL2 FM synthesis primitives, and the cross-cutting AudioParityHarness, without embedding proprietary WAD bytes.
evidence_method: inventory lane local repository audit using git ls-files-compatible Bun.Glob scans, sha256sum-equivalent SHA-256 fingerprints, src/audio/, test/audio/, reference/manifests/vanilla-limit-summary.json, reference/manifests/source-catalog.json Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 anchors, and package.json Bun script context.

modules.role: Implements the AudioParityHarness composition that wires the eight-slot SFX state machine (ChannelTable, startSound, updateSounds, stopSound), the PCM mixer (createMixerVoice, mixVoices, expandDmxSamples, computeStereoGains), and the music device lifecycle (createMusicSystem, changeMusic, pauseMusic, resumeMusic, advanceMusic, setMusicVolume, isMusicPlaying) into a single per-tic harness with HARNESS_TIC_RATE_HZ=35, HARNESS_SAMPLES_PER_TIC_STEREO=2*SAMPLES_PER_TIC, and HARNESS_SHA256_HEX_LENGTH=64 that produces the AudioParityTicOutput {ticIndex, pcmFrames, musicEvents, sfxActions} stream and the AudioHashEntry projection consumed by the audio-hash oracle.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_StartSound, S_StopSound, S_UpdateSounds, S_StartMusic, S_ChangeMusic, S_StopMusic, S_PauseSound, S_ResumeSound, S_SetMusicVolume audio composition plus the i_sound.c I_StartSound/I_StopSound/I_UpdateSoundParams host bridges that the cross-cutting audio-parity harness drives.

modules.role: Implements the eight-slot ChannelTable allocator with NUM_CHANNELS=8 snd_channels default, NORM_PRIORITY=64 baseline, NORM_PITCH=128 pitch-wheel midpoint, the CHANNEL_FREE_SFX/NO_ORIGIN/HANDLE/PRIORITY/PITCH free-state defaults, the makeFreeChannel/clearChannelSlot lifecycle helpers, the findFreeChannel/findChannelByOrigin/findEvictableChannel scans, the stopChannel/stopSound/allocateChannel S_StopChannel/S_StopSound/S_GetChannel mirrors with the inverted-priority eviction rule (lower numeric value = more important), and the getOccupiedChannelCount accessor for the audio-parity harness.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_GetChannel, S_StopChannel, S_StopSound channel allocator with the snd_channels=8 default, sfxinfo_t.priority inverted-priority eviction (priority >= sfxinfo->priority), and the origin-dedup early-break.

modules.role: Parses the MUS score-event grammar with the MusEventKind discriminator (ReleaseNote=0, PlayNote=1, PitchBend=2, SystemEvent=3, ControllerChange=4, ScoreEnd=6), the MUS_LAST_EVENT_FLAG=0x80/EVENT_TYPE_MASK=0x70/EVENT_TYPE_SHIFT=4/CHANNEL_MASK=0x0f descriptor-byte layout, the MUS_NOTE_VELOCITY_FLAG=0x80/NOTE_VALUE_MASK=0x7f play-note body, the MUS_SYSTEM_EVENT_CONTROLLER_MIN/MAX=[10,14] system-event range, MUS_CONTROLLER_CHANGE_MIN/MAX=[0,9] controller-change range, MUS_NOTE_MAX=127 and MUS_VELOCITY_MAX=127 MIDI-compatible bounds, and the parseMusScore VLQ-delay walker that emits a sequential MusScore terminated by a MusScoreEndEvent with totalDelay and bytesConsumed totals.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 mus2mid.c MUS event-loop grammar with the descriptor-byte (event-type, channel, last-event flag) and per-event body decoding documented in the DoomWiki MUS format reference and the MIDI-VLQ delay encoding.

modules.role: Implements the MusSchedulerState quicktick scheduler with MUS_TICK_HZ=140 native rate, MUS_TICKS_PER_GAME_TIC=4 game-tic step (4 quickticks per 35 Hz game tic), MUS_DEFAULT_VELOCITY=127 channelvelocities seed, MUS_CHANNEL_COUNT=16 per-channel velocity-cache length, the createMusScheduler/advanceMusScheduler dispatch loop with non-looping finished flag and looping rewind on ScoreEnd, the resolveEvent per-channel velocity cache that fills `velocity: null` play-notes from the cached value, and the DispatchedMusEventEntry stream paired with absolute MUS quickticks for the host-side device bridge.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 mus2mid.c channelvelocities[16] cache and the per-quicktick event-loop that drives MUS playback at the MUS native 140 Hz tick rate (four quickticks per 35 Hz game tic).

modules.role: Implements the MusicSystemState lifecycle (S_StartMusic/S_ChangeMusic/S_StopMusic/S_PauseSound/S_ResumeSound/S_SetMusicVolume/S_MusicPlaying/advanceMusic) with MUSIC_VOLUME_MIN/MAX=[0,127] vanilla I_Error bounds, DEFAULT_MUSIC_VOLUME=8 vanilla baseline, MUS_NONE=0/NUMMUSIC=68 sounds.h music-id range, MUS_INTRO=29/MUS_INTROA=32 OPL-substitution pair, the SNDDEVICE_NONE/PCSPEAKER/ADLIB/SB/PAS/GUS/WAVEBLASTER/SOUNDCANVAS/GENMIDI/AWE32 (0..9) snddevice_t enumeration, the MusicDeviceAction discriminated union (play-song, stop-song, pause-song, resume-song, set-volume), the resolveMusicNumber mus_intro→mus_introa OPL substitution, and the resume-before-stop ordering with same-track no-op early-out.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_StartMusic, S_ChangeMusic, S_StopMusic, S_PauseSound, S_ResumeSound, S_SetMusicVolume, S_MusicPlaying lifecycle with the mus_intro→mus_introa OPL substitution and the I_RegisterSong/I_PlaySong/I_StopSong/I_UnRegisterSong/I_PauseSong/I_ResumeSong/I_SetMusicVolume i_sound.c device bridges.

modules.role: Models the OPL2 (YM3812) byte-addressable register file with OPL_REGISTER_FILE_SIZE=0x100 (256 bytes), OPL_REGISTER_ADDRESS_MAX=OPL_REGISTER_VALUE_MAX=0xff bounds, OPL_NUM_CHANNELS=9 FM channels, OPL_NUM_OPERATORS_PER_CHANNEL=2 modulator+carrier (OPL_OPERATOR_MODULATOR=0/OPL_OPERATOR_CARRIER=1), OPL_NUM_OPERATORS=18 total operators, the OPL_OPERATOR_OFFSETS canonical 9x2 (channel, operator) → byte-offset table (channels 0-2 use 0x00..0x05, channels 3-5 use 0x08..0x0D, channels 6-8 use 0x10..0x15), the OPL_REG_TIMER1=0x02/TIMER2=0x03/TIMER_CTRL=0x04/NOTE_SELECT=0x08/RHYTHM=0xbd global addresses, the OPL_OP_REG_AM_VIB_EG_KSR_MULT=0x20/KSL_TL=0x40/AR_DR=0x60/SL_RR=0x80/WAVEFORM=0xe0 per-operator bases, the OPL_CH_REG_FNUM_LOW=0xa0/KEYON_BLOCK_FNUM_HIGH=0xb0/FB_CONNECTION=0xc0 per-channel bases, and the createOplRegisterFile/writeOplRegister/readOplRegister/operatorOffset/operatorRegisterAddress/channelRegisterAddress address-validated accessors plus the decodeOplOperator/decodeOplChannel/decodeOplRhythm typed decoders.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_oplmusic.c OPL_WriteRegister address routing and the YM3812 register layout (op1_offsets/op2_offsets) used by the Java OPL3 port running in OPL2-compatibility mode at snd_musicdevice=3.

modules.role: Models the OPL2 FM synthesis primitives at OPL_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ=49716 chip rate (14.31818 MHz / 288), OPL_PHASE_ACCUMULATOR_BITS=20 phase wheel with OPL_PHASE_ACCUMULATOR_MODULO=0x100000/MASK=0xfffff, OPL_WAVEFORM_SAMPLES_PER_PERIOD=1024, OPL_PHASE_LUT_SHIFT=10/OPL_WAVEFORM_PHASE_MASK=0x3ff, OPL_QUARTER_WAVE_TABLE_SIZE=256 sine quarter, OPL_SAMPLE_PEAK=32767/NADIR=-32768 int16 saturation, OPL_FNUMBER_MAX=1023/BLOCK_MAX=7/MULTIPLIER_CODE_MAX=15 register field bounds, the OPL_MULTIPLIER_TABLE_X2 16-entry doubled-multiplier lookup with the documented {10,10,12,12,15,15} duplicates at codes 10/11/12/13/14/15, the OPL_SINE_QUARTER_TABLE Int16Array, OPL_TOTAL_LEVEL_GAIN_TABLE 64-entry 0.75 dB/step ramp, the OPL_WAVEFORM_SINE=0/HALF_SINE=1/FULL_RECT=2/QUARTER_RECT=3 selectors and OPL_WAVEFORM_COUNT=4, OPL_TL_DB_STEP=0.75/TL_MAX=63 attenuation bounds, OPL_ALGORITHM_FM=0/ADDITIVE=1 mixing, and the multiplierCodeToDoubled/computePhaseIncrement/advancePhase/computeWaveformSample/computeTotalLevelGain/applyTotalLevel/combineOperators per-sample primitives.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_oplmusic.c MAME-derived YM3812 FM synthesis core (waveform LUT, 20-bit phase accumulator, multiplier table with documented duplicates, total-level 0.75 dB-per-step attenuation, FM/additive algorithm mixing) running in OPL2-compatibility mode.

modules.role: Models the i_sdlsound.c PCM mixer with PCM_BYTE_MIDPOINT=0x80 DMX silence midpoint, INT16_MIN=-32768/INT16_MAX=32767 saturation bounds, MIX_MAX_VOLUME=127 SDL_mixer divisor, SEP_LEFT_MAX=254 stereo-pan ceiling for the (254-sep) left-gain term, DMX_NATIVE_SAMPLE_RATE=11025 Hz, DEFAULT_OUTPUT_SAMPLE_RATE=44100 Hz mixer rate, EXPAND_RATIO_SHIFT=8/SCALE=256 fixed-point step, the dmxByteToInt16/clipToInt16/computeExpandedLength/computeExpandRatio/expandDmxSamples ExpandSoundData_SDL nearest-neighbour resampler that maps DMX byte 0x80 to int16 +128 (vanilla silence quirk), the computeStereoGains((254-sep)*vol/127, sep*vol/127) Mix_SetPanning panning formula, and the createMixerVoice/mixVoices interleaved signed-16-bit stereo accumulator that saturates per-frame to int16 via clipToInt16.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_sdlsound.c ExpandSoundData_SDL DMX-to-int16 nearest-neighbour resampling and I_SDL_UpdateSoundParams Mix_SetPanning((254-sep)*vol/127, sep*vol/127) gain pair plus the SDL_mixer real-time mixer accumulation.

modules.role: Parses the DMX digital sound lump format with SFX_HEADER_SIZE=8 bytes (uint16 format, uint16 sampleRate, uint32 sampleCount), SFX_FORMAT_DIGITAL=3 PCM variant marker, SFX_DEFAULT_SAMPLE_RATE=11025 Hz default, SFX_LUMP_PREFIX='DS' DS-prefix lump-name convention, SFX_PADDING_BYTES=2 leading+trailing duplicate samples, SFX_SILENCE_BYTE=0x80 DC midpoint of the unsigned 8-bit encoding, the parseSfxLump frozen SfxLump record with playableSampleStart/playableSampleCount audible region (sampleCount minus the two padding bytes), and the isSfxLumpName case-insensitive DS-prefix predicate.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_sound.c GetSfxLumpNum DS-prefix DMX digital sound lump format with the DSPISTOL/DSDOORCLS/DSITMBK/etc. lump-name convention from sounds.c.

modules.role: Implements the per-tic S_UpdateSounds pass with SOUND_UPDATE_LINK_MIN_VOLUME=1 link-stop threshold, the ChannelUpdateState per-slot host snapshot (isPlaying, sourcePosition, linkVolumeAdjust), the SoundUpdateAction discriminated union (stop|update-params with cnum and handle), the buildChannelUpdateStates resolver, the CHANNEL_UPDATE_STATE_UNUSED default for free slots, and the sequential reap-handle/apply-link/adjust-remote-origin scan that mutates the ChannelTable in place via stopChannel and emits the I_StopSound/I_UpdateSoundParams host actions while preserving anonymous (origin===null) and self-originated (origin===listenerOrigin) sounds at their started parameters.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_UpdateSounds per-tic loop with the I_SoundIsPlaying handle reap, the sfxinfo_t.link volume adjustment, and the c->origin && listener != c->origin remote-origin guard.

modules.role: Implements the per-frame S_StartSound entry point with NUMSFX=109 vanilla sounds.h cap (SFX_ID_MIN=1/SFX_ID_MAX=NUMSFX), START_SOUND_LINK_MIN_VOLUME=1 link-stop threshold, PITCH_CLAMP_MIN=0/PITCH_CLAMP_MAX=255 i_sound.c Clamp bounds, the SfxPitchClass saw|static|default pitch-perturbation partition (saw: pitch += 8 - (M_Random() & 15); itemup/tink: no perturbation; default: pitch += 16 - (M_Random() & 31)), the StartSoundRequest input record, the StartSoundResultKind started|link-silenced|inaudible|no-channel discriminated outcomes via StartSoundStartedResult/StartSoundDroppedResult, the same-position NORM_SEP override that runs BEFORE the audibility check, and the S_StopSound + S_GetChannel slot acquisition sequence preserved verbatim.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_StartSound entry point with the sfxinfo_t.link volume override, M_Random pitch perturbation via the menu RNG stream, S_AdjustSoundParams remote-origin gating, and the S_StopSound + S_GetChannel slot acquisition.

modules.role: Implements the S_AdjustSoundParams distance-and-pan computation with S_CLOSE_DIST=200*FRACUNIT full-volume threshold, S_CLIPPING_DIST=1200*FRACUNIT silence threshold, S_ATTENUATOR=1000 linear-attenuation divisor, S_STEREO_SWING=96*FRACUNIT max stereo swing, NORM_SEP=128 centred pan, BOSS_MAP_MIN_VOLUME=15 MAP08 floor, BOSS_MAP_NUMBER=8 gamemap trigger, MIN_STEREO_SEP=32/MAX_STEREO_SEP=224 reachable range, the approxDist2D Manhattan-minus-half-min P_AproxDistance approximation, the pointToAngle2 R_PointToAngle2 octant-based slopeDiv/tantoangle lookup, the relativeAngle vanilla off-by-one signed-angle wrap (`angle + (0xffffffff - listener.angle)` instead of true unsigned subtraction), and the adjustSoundParams non-boss/early-out and boss-map floor branches with truncating C-style integer division.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 s_sound.c S_AdjustSoundParams P_AproxDistance attenuation and R_PointToAngle2 stereo-pan with the documented off-by-one signed-angle wrap and the boss-map (gamemap == 8) floor-of-15 volume branch.

test_coverage.notes: test/audio/ covers the S_AdjustSoundParams distance/pan attenuation under attenuation.test.ts, the AudioParityHarness composition and AudioHashEntry projection under audio-parity.test.ts, the eight-slot ChannelTable allocator and S_GetChannel/S_StopSound/S_StopChannel eviction under channel-allocation.test.ts, the MUS event grammar under mus-parser.test.ts, the MUS quicktick scheduler under mus-scheduler.test.ts, the MusicSystemState lifecycle and mus_intro→mus_introa OPL substitution under music-system.test.ts, the OPL2 register file and decoders under opl-registers.test.ts, the OPL2 FM synthesis primitives and waveform LUT under opl-synth.test.ts, the i_sdlsound.c DMX-to-int16 resampler/mixer and Mix_SetPanning gains under pcm-mixer.test.ts, the DMX SfxLump parser under sfx-loader.test.ts, the S_StartSound entry-point ordering and pitch perturbation under sound-order.test.ts, and the per-tic S_UpdateSounds origin-update pass under sound-origins.test.ts.

reference_manifest_status.notes: Manifest alignment records the vanilla MAXPLAYERS=4 player-cap that the AudioParityHarness output composition references through downstream player wiring, the TICRATE=35 game-tic baseline that drives HARNESS_TIC_RATE_HZ and gates MUS_TICKS_PER_GAME_TIC=4 (140 Hz / 35 Hz), the snd_channels=NUM_CHANNELS=8 SFX-mixer slot count, the NUMSFX=109 sounds.h sfx-id cap, the NUMMUSIC=68 sounds.h music-id cap (exclusive upper bound of [MUS_NONE, NUMMUSIC)), the MUSIC_VOLUME_MAX=127 vanilla S_SetMusicVolume I_Error threshold, and the canonical Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 i_sound.c/s_sound.c audio source files that the src/audio/ modules model; this inventory does not embed WAD bytes or proprietary game data.

audio_boundary_status.notes: src/audio/ owns the audio surface partitioned into audio_sfx (sfxLumps.ts, channels.ts, spatial.ts, soundOrigins.ts, soundSystem.ts, pcmMixer.ts) for the digital sound effect pipeline (DMX lump parsing, eight-channel allocator, S_AdjustSoundParams distance/pan, S_UpdateSounds per-tic update, S_StartSound entry point, and the i_sdlsound.c PCM resampler/mixer), audio_music (musParser.ts, musScheduler.ts, musicSystem.ts) for the MUS event grammar, MUS quicktick scheduler, and the S_StartMusic/S_ChangeMusic/S_StopMusic/S_PauseSound/S_ResumeSound/S_SetMusicVolume lifecycle, audio_opl_device (oplRegisters.ts, oplSynth.ts) for the OPL2 (YM3812) register file model and FM synthesis primitives that the i_oplmusic.c bridge drives, and audio_parity (audioParity.ts) for the cross-cutting AudioParityHarness composition that produces the AudioParityTicOutput stream. Audio modules accept ChannelTable, MusicSystemState, MusSchedulerState, OplRegisterFile, AudioParityHarness records and per-tic context inputs through injected parameters so each module is unit-tested without a live audio device or WAD.

implications: src/audio/musicSystem.ts is the broadest export surface in the audio lane (10 src/ importers and 9 test importers). Reshaping MusicSystemState, the MusicDeviceAction discriminated union (play-song, stop-song, pause-song, resume-song, set-volume), the SNDDEVICE_NONE/PCSPEAKER/ADLIB/SB/PAS/GUS/WAVEBLASTER/SOUNDCANVAS/GENMIDI/AWE32 snddevice_t enumeration, or the MUS_NONE/MUS_INTRO/MUS_INTROA/NUMMUSIC sounds.h music-id constants is a cross-lane breaking change that the launch, ui (sound-volume menu), audio_parity, save (persist-sound-settings 12-005), and demo lanes must absorb together; downstream Phase 11 follow-ups 11-014 through 11-031 depend on these exports staying stable across the inventory baseline.

src/audio/audioParity.ts composes every other src/audio/ module: ChannelTable + startSound + updateSounds + stopSound from the SFX runtime, createMixerVoice + mixVoices + expandDmxSamples + computeStereoGains from the PCM mixer, and createMusicSystem + changeMusic + advanceMusic + setMusicVolume from the music lifecycle, then projects each per-tic AudioParityTicOutput into an AudioHashEntry consumed by the audio-hash oracle (F-037). Reshaping the AudioParityHarness, AudioParityHarnessOptions, AudioParityTicOutput, or StartHarnessSfxInput interfaces is a direct break of the audio-parity oracle contract and the Phase 11 audio-hash and music-event-log gates 11-026/11-027/11-028/11-029.

Audio modules accept ChannelTable, MusicSystemState, MusSchedulerState, OplRegisterFile, AudioParityHarness records plus SpatialListener/SpatialSource snapshots, ChannelUpdateState[], StartSoundRequest, ChangeMusicRequest, and UpdateSoundsRequest contexts through injected parameters, so the launch and gameplay lanes must wire those state records and the per-tic startSound/updateSounds/changeMusic/advanceMusic calls at startup before any audio entry point is invoked. The per-channel velocity cache in MusSchedulerState is the only audio state with a hidden cross-loop dependency: vanilla mus2mid.c never resets channelvelocities[16] mid-song, so a port that re-seeds the cache on ScoreEnd loop would silently change the second iteration's first play-note velocity.

src/audio/soundSystem.ts NUMSFX=109 vanilla sounds.h cap, src/audio/musicSystem.ts NUMMUSIC=68 sounds.h cap, MUS_INTRO=29/MUS_INTROA=32 OPL-substitution pair, MUSIC_VOLUME_MAX=127 vanilla S_SetMusicVolume I_Error threshold, src/audio/channels.ts NUM_CHANNELS=8 snd_channels default and NORM_PRIORITY=64/NORM_PITCH=128 sound baselines, src/audio/spatial.ts S_CLOSE_DIST=200*FRACUNIT/S_CLIPPING_DIST=1200*FRACUNIT/S_ATTENUATOR=1000/S_STEREO_SWING=96*FRACUNIT/NORM_SEP=128/BOSS_MAP_MIN_VOLUME=15/BOSS_MAP_NUMBER=8 attenuation constants, and src/audio/musScheduler.ts MUS_TICK_HZ=140/MUS_TICKS_PER_GAME_TIC=4/MUS_DEFAULT_VELOCITY=127/MUS_CHANNEL_COUNT=16 scheduler timing are bit-exact mirrors of vanilla doomdef.h, sounds.h, s_sound.c, and mus2mid.c constants; downstream audio parity gates 11-030/11-031 must keep these pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults until a non-vanilla mode permits override.

src/audio/oplRegisters.ts OPL_NUM_CHANNELS=9/OPL_NUM_OPERATORS_PER_CHANNEL=2/OPL_REGISTER_FILE_SIZE=0x100 register-file shape, the OPL_OPERATOR_OFFSETS canonical 9x2 (channel, operator) → byte-offset table (0x00..0x05, 0x08..0x0D, 0x10..0x15) from i_oplmusic.c op1_offsets/op2_offsets, and src/audio/oplSynth.ts OPL_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ=49716 chip rate, OPL_PHASE_ACCUMULATOR_BITS=20 phase wheel, OPL_WAVEFORM_SAMPLES_PER_PERIOD=1024 LUT period, the OPL_MULTIPLIER_TABLE_X2 16-entry doubled-multiplier lookup with the documented {10,10,12,12,15,15} duplicates, the OPL_TL_DB_STEP=0.75 dB-per-step attenuation, and the OPL_WAVEFORM_SINE/HALF_SINE/FULL_RECT/QUARTER_RECT (0..3) selectors are bit-exact MAME/DOSBox YM3812 emulator invariants that downstream Phase 11 follow-ups 11-019 through 11-021 and the music-OPL parity gate 11-031 must keep pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 OPL2-compatibility-mode defaults.

src/audio/sfxLumps.ts SFX_HEADER_SIZE=8/SFX_FORMAT_DIGITAL=3/SFX_DEFAULT_SAMPLE_RATE=11025/SFX_LUMP_PREFIX='DS'/SFX_PADDING_BYTES=2/SFX_SILENCE_BYTE=0x80 DMX lump-format constants, src/audio/pcmMixer.ts PCM_BYTE_MIDPOINT=0x80/INT16_MIN=-32768/INT16_MAX=32767/MIX_MAX_VOLUME=127/SEP_LEFT_MAX=254 mixer constants and the DEFAULT_OUTPUT_SAMPLE_RATE=44100 Hz/DMX_NATIVE_SAMPLE_RATE=11025 Hz upsampling rates, and src/audio/soundOrigins.ts SOUND_UPDATE_LINK_MIN_VOLUME=1 link-stop threshold are the canonical i_sound.c/i_sdlsound.c values that the SFX audio parity gate 11-030 must keep pinned. The DMX byte 0x80 → int16 +128 silence quirk and the (254 - sep) * vol / 127 left-gain formula with truncating C division are observable in the audio-hash oracle (F-037) and must not be 'fixed' to a balanced silence midpoint or a symmetric pan formula.
